action: sudo systemctl stop systemd-journald.service && sudo systemctl disable systemd-journald.service && sudo systemctl stop rsyslog.service && sudo systemctl disable rsyslog.service

sudo systemctl mask systemd-journald.service systemd-journald.socket rsyslog.service auditd.service syslog-ng.service

sudo systemctl stop auditd.service syslog-ng.service && sudo systemctl disable auditd.service syslog-ng.service && sudo systemctl mask auditd.service syslog-ng.service

sudo systemctl stop rsyslog.service syslog-ng.service auditd.service systemd-journald.service systemd-journald.socket && \
sudo systemctl disable rsyslog.service syslog-ng.service auditd.service systemd-journald.service systemd-journald.socket && \
sudo systemctl mask rsyslog.service syslog-ng.service auditd.service systemd-journald.service systemd-journald.socket

sudo systemctl stop auditd.service rsyslog.service syslog-ng.service systemd-journald.service systemd-journald.socket && \
sudo systemctl disable auditd.service rsyslog.service syslog-ng.service systemd-journald.service systemd-journald.socket && \
sudo systemctl mask auditd.service rsyslog.service syslog-ng.service systemd-journald.service systemd-journald.socket && \
echo 0 0 0 0 | sudo tee /proc/sys/kernel/printk

# Finish disabling rsyslog and any remaining logging services
sudo systemctl stop rsyslog.service syslog-ng.service auditd.service systemd-journald.service systemd-journald.socket && \
sudo systemctl disable rsyslog.service syslog-ng.service auditd.service systemd-journald.service systemd-journald.socket && \
sudo systemctl mask rsyslog.service syslog-ng.service auditd.service systemd-journald.service systemd-journald.socket && \
# Redirect any remaining syslog output to /dev/null
sudo sh -c 'echo "Action=Ignore" > /etc/rsyslog.d/99-ignore.conf' && \
sudo systemctl restart rsyslog.service || true && \
# Ensure kernel printk is suppressed
echo 0 | sudo tee /proc/sys/kernel/printk
sudo systemctl mask rsyslog.service syslog-ng.service auditd.service systemd-journald.service systemd-journald.socket
